titleStmt.title: SII 38.474: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 474. (A.R. No. 474 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north base, maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakkaravartti Rājēndrachōḷa III Year 10: 1256 A.D.

summary.p: Records the order of the members of the assembly of Siṅgaḷāntakanallūr, a hamlet in Śrīsuddavalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Puṟaṅgarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndrasōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The order was issued to Dāmadavalli uḍaiyāṉ Mahājanappiriyaṉ, the accountant of the ūr instructing him to exempt taxes on 3/4 vēli and 2(1/2) mā land in the same ūr purchased by Cheṭṭalūr Mudalippiḷḷai of Śrīvīranārayaṇachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a taṉiyūr of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, from the temple (tirunāmattukkāṇi), inorder to provide food offerings, garlands and oil to the god Āvuḍaiyār consecrated at the circumbalatory path (tirunaḍaimāḷigai) on the northern side of the first prākāra of Tirutturaināyanār temple. The total extent of the land and details of some adjustments regarding the effect on account of revised measure (maḍakku) are given. The accountant of the ūr Dāmadavalli uḍaiyāṉ mahājaṉappiriyaṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentiracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu varuṣam pattāvatuBelow this line the name komut[ra]paṭṭaṉ is engraved.rācentiracoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu brahmadeśam śrī cuttavalliccaruppetimaṅkalattu piṭākai ciṅkaḷāntakanallūr kūṭṭapperu makkaḷ EḻuntuRead as eḻuttu [*] Ūrkaṇakku tāmatavalli Uṭaiyāṉ mahājaṉappiriyaṉ kaṇṭu . Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaināyaṉārkoyil mutalpirakārattu vaṭakkil tirunaṭaimāḷikaiyil vaṭakarai virutarācappayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu
t taṉiyūr śrīviranāraāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattuc ceṭṭalūr mutalippiḷḷai Āvuṭaiyārai Eḻuntaruḷivittateṉṟum Iṉnāyaṉārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkum tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruviḷakkeṇṇai UḷḷaṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkumRead as uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkumIṉnāyaṉārkku nammuril tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟuppāṉa nilattile ciṟutu nilam vilai koṇṭeṉ Eṉṟum Innilam Iṟaiyili Ākacceytu taraveṇum Eṉṟum Ivaṉ coṉṉamaiyil Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyil Ivaṉ vilaikoṇṭa trilokkiya
mātevivītikku kiḻakku cikaraṇavīraykkālukkuRead as vāykkālukkuvaṭakku vu kūli 2 catarattu kiḻkkaṭaiya [ruṭakapumā�] śrīmanikki Itaṉ meṟkku tirunāmattu kāṇi » cama ra Itil kiḻakkiṭaiyaRead as kiḻakkaṭaiyaIvaṉvilai koṇṭa » ṉāmāviṉāl karappaṭiRead as tarappaṭimaṭakku » kite 1araikkāl Innilam Araimāviṉāl karappaṭiRead as tarappaṭimaṭakku nilam kiḻmukkāle Irumāvaraiyum Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉa mutal cantirātittavaraikku Iṟaiyiliyāka niṟkavum Imaṭakku nilam kiḻ mukkāle Irumāvaraiyiṉṉāl Oṭṭuppaṭi
nellu nilamurRead as nilamumIvvāṇṭu pācaṉam variyaṟukiṟa maṭakkile Imaṭakku nikki nikkiniṉṟa maṭakkile Eruviḻukkāṭu koṇṭu Iṟukkavum Innilam Araimāviṉāl maṭakku nilam kiḻ mukkāle Irumāvaraiyum Iṟaiyiliyāṉa maṭakku taṉeḻuttāle kaṇakku Eḻutikuṭukkakaṭavaṉākavum coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyka paṇiyāl Ūrārrkaṇakku tāmatavalli Uṭaiyāṉ mahājaṉappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷattu periyanampipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai kuṇṭur cimātava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivaik kuṇṭur tillaināyakapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur viṉāyaka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur piḷḷainampi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur cirāma paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāṟciṟaippavatecu paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaraikkum Iṟaiyiliyāka niṟpatāka kallile Eḻuttu veṭṭivittu koḷḷavum paṇṇu(k)e paṇiyāl Iṉmahājaṉapiriyaṉ Eḻuttu § .
Digital edition of SII 38.474 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
